title: Contact us | Beehive.govt.nz
content:
Beehive.govt.nz is administered by the Department of Internal Affairs. Content released on the website is owned and authorised by the relevant Minister/s at the time of publication.
If you have an inquiry regarding the topic or content of any information on the website released by the current Government, please get in touch with the relevant Minister by email. To do so, check out our directory of ministers and portfolios .
If you have an inquiry regarding historic information released by a previous Government, or to report a technical issue with this website, please email: Ministerial.Resourcing@dia.govt.nz

#### To write to ministers by post, address your mail like this:
Hon (Minister Name) Minister for/of (Portfolio) Parliament Buildings Wellington 6160 New Zealand
